data.title: AI Eyes Move Onto The Counter-Drone Battlefield As Defense Tech Companies Race To Fuse Video With RF
data.description: A modern wave of "video-as-a-sensor" systems is bridging the visual-confirmation void in RF-focused defense setups. Noteworthy tickers in this sector include VisionWave Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: VWAV), Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR), BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BBAI), and Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: KTOS).
Facephi will announce audited 2025 financial results on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Textron Aviation Defense Awarded Five-Year Sustaining Engineering and Program Management Contract for Beechcraft T-6 Texan II Fleet
data.description: Textron Aviation Defense, based in Wichita, Kansas, has secured a renewed five-year SEPM contract to sustain over 700 Beechcraft T-6 Texan II aircraft. This contract solidifies their commitment to providing maintenance and support for a significant fleet of military training aircraft.

data.title: Newest Gorbel® Hoist Features Advanced Variable Frequency Drive Technology
data.description: Gorbel® has introduced an upgrade in Variable Frequency Drives (VFD) technology for industrial lifting applications in Fishers, New York on April 13, 2026. The new VFD promises improved control, precision, and productivity for demanding industrial tasks. This development marks a significant advancement in the industry as VFDs are increasingly becoming the preferred choice, setting a higher performance standard.

data.title: Bitcoin Needs To Close A Week Above $71,000 And The Rally Is On, Analyst Says
data.description: Bitcoin traders are closely monitoring whether the cryptocurrency can reclaim crucial technical levels amidst macroeconomic uncertainty. In the latest Technical Roundup podcast, trader DonAlt highlighted that Bitcoin's key level to watch is a weekly close above $71,000. Achieving this milestone would bolster the case for a sustained breakout, as a previous attempt was hindered by geopolitical turmoil. Despite a second attempt underway, DonAlt noted that consecutive failed breakouts are rare. Maintaining above $71,000 would likely indicate further upside potential, with the next significant resistance point seen at around $82,000. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mouser Electronics Honored with Americas Distributor of the Year Award by Harwin
data.description: Mouser Electronics, Inc. based in Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, has been recognized by Harwin as the Americas Distributor of the Year. Harwin, a renowned manufacturer of interconnect components, awarded Mouser for its outstanding performance in the fiscal year spanning April 2025 to March 2026. The recognition highlights Mouser's impressive sales and customer expansion during this period, in addition to its robust revenue growth. This achievement signifies Mouser's strong position as a top global distributor for cutting-edge electronic components and industrial automation products.
Fed bids for 3-month bills total $3.5 bln. Fed bids for 6-month bills total $3 bln.

data.title: Green Bonds Market to Reach $1,555.1 billion, Globally, by 2033 at 10.1% CAGR: Allied Market Research
data.description: The green bonds market is experiencing significant growth due to increasing climate awareness, government regulations, and investor interest in sustainable investments. Government policies and financial institutions are endorsing green financing to address environmental concerns. Regulatory frameworks such as the EU Green standards are further boosting this trend. This market has seen a substantial increase in issuance, reaching $269.5 billion in 2020 compared to $215 billion in 2019. This growth is expected to continue as more entities prioritize eco-friendly investments.

data.title: BODYBAR Pilates Launches First-Ever National Ad Campaign Featuring Real Members, Instructors
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, BODYBAR Pilates, a prominent modern Pilates franchise based in FORT WORTH, Texas, unveiled its inaugural nationwide advertising initiative on April 13, 2026. The campaign is distinctive in its focus on genuine individuals and their authentic narratives, devoid of any paid actors. This marks a pivotal moment for the brand as it expands its reach across the country.

data.title: Caldwell Cassady & Curry Wins Managing IP Awards for Impact Case, Patent Litigator of the Year
data.description: In April 13, 2026, the Dallas-based legal firm Caldwell Cassady & Curry received accolades at the recent Managing IP Awards in New York. The firm has had a successful year with a series of high-value verdicts and settlements for clients. Renowned for their expertise in intellectual property and business litigation, the firm continues to excel in their field.

data.title: Marelli Announces Leadership Appointments
data.description: On April 13, 2026 in Saitama, Japan, a global Tier 1 automotive supplier named Marelli revealed the appointment of Frederick "Fritz" Henderson as their new Interim Chief Executive Officer. This change is effective immediately. Henderson takes over from David Slump, and the latter will remain in service.

data.title: Denice Biocca Joins Vontier as Chief People Officer
data.description: Vontier Corporation, a key player in critical technologies for the mobility sector, has named Denice Biocca as their new Chief People Officer. Biocca will oversee the global human resources operations for the company. CEO Mark Morelli expressed excitement about Biocca joining Vontier, citing her substantial leadership background in large industrial enterprises. Vontier is traded on NYSE as VNT and is known for its solutions connecting and scaling the mobility ecosystem.

data.title: FOX NATION TO PREMIERE SEASON TWO OF "GREG GUTFELD'S WHAT DID I MISS?" ON APRIL 27TH
data.description: A fresh set of participants emerged after undergoing a three-month quarantine period to participate in Gutfeld's quiz testing real versus fake news headlines. The event, titled What Did I Miss?, is part of season two airing on FOX Nation. The challenge was unveiled by Lauren Petterson, the streaming platform's president, in New York on April 13, 2026. The intriguing competition brings together a new group to decipher the accuracy of news stories in interactive sessions.

data.title: Enterprises Seek Structured, Low-risk Mainframe Modernization Plans
data.description: A recent report by ISG reveals that enterprises are increasingly turning to long-term, software-focused modernization strategies for their mainframe environments in Stamford, Conn. This shift aims to enhance adaptability and resilience. The transition is being fueled by the growing need for businesses to stay competitive in the ever-evolving market. The focus on software-led modernization is driven by the desire to boost efficiency and future-proof operations. The adoption of these strategies marks a significant trend among enterprises, with a noticeable increase in the number of companies embracing this approach.

data.title: VB Spine Completes Transaction of Augmented Reality Spine Platform from Augmedics
data.description: A recent acquisition occurred between VB Spine LLC and Augmedics, where VB Spine gained exclusive rights to the xvision Spine System. The swift completion of this transaction highlights the significance of the xvision Spine System in revolutionizing spine care. According to Marc Viscog, VB Spine's spokesperson, the speed of the acquisition showcases the importance of augmented reality in healthcare. The company is now focused on implementing operational strategies to maximize the potential of this acquisition.

data.title: UserTesting Appoints Ryan Roland as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Bellevue, Washington - UserTesting, a prominent provider of customer insights for enterprises, has appointed Ryan Roland as its Chief Financial Officer. Roland will oversee UserTesting's worldwide finance department, managing accounting, financial planning and analysis, and information technology. Prior to joining UserTesting, Roland held the position of Chief Financial Officer at Overjet, aiding in the expansion of the company's financial operations during a phase of swift growth.
